content:
app/schemas/bill.py :: BillCreate
class BillCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=255)
    merchant_name: str | None = None
    currency: str = "USD"
    notes: str | None = None

app/schemas/bill.py :: BillUpdate
class BillUpdate(BaseModel):
    title: str | None = None
    merchant_name: str | None = None
    currency: str | None = None
    subtotal: Decimal | None = None
    tax: Decimal | None = None
    tip: Decimal | None = None
    service_fee: Decimal | None = None
    total: Decimal | None = None
    notes: str | None = None
    status: str | None = None

app/schemas/bill.py :: BillOut
class BillOut(BaseModel):
    id: uuid.UUID
    title: str
    merchant_name: str | None = None
    currency: str
    status: str
    owner_id: uuid.UUID
    subtotal: Decimal
    tax: Decimal
    tip: Decimal
    service_fee: Decimal
    service_fee_type: str | None = None
    service_fee_percentage: Decimal | None = None
    total: Decimal
    notes: str | None = None
    member_count: int = 0
    ready_to_pay: bool = False
    ready_reason: str | None = None
    ready_marked_at: datetime | None = None
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}

app/schemas/bill.py :: MarkReadyRequest
class MarkReadyRequest(BaseModel):
    reason: Literal["fully_collected", "owner_override"] = "fully_collected"
    notes: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=500)

app/schemas/bill.py :: ReadinessOut
class ReadinessOut(BaseModel):
    bill_id: uuid.UUID
    ready_to_pay: bool
    total_collected: Decimal
    amount_to_collect: Decimal
    bill_total: Decimal
    collection_pct: Decimal
    meets_threshold: bool
    ready_reason: str | None = None
    ready_marked_at: datetime | None = None
    ready_marked_by: uuid.UUID | None = None

app/schemas/bill.py :: ServiceFeeUpdate
class ServiceFeeUpdate(BaseModel):
    fee_type: Literal["flat", "percentage"]
    percentage: Decimal | None = Field(default=None, ge=0, le=100, description="Percentage (0-100) for percentage-based fees")

app/schemas/bill.py :: BillActivity
class BillActivity(BaseModel):
    type: str
    description: str
    timestamp: datetime
    actor_name: str | None = None
